raw:
{
  "judge_id": "judge_1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent removed redundant novelty claims but only named one prior work and articulated the delta without mapping against multiple works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flagged missing citations and uncertainties but did not audit every load-bearing citation thoroughly.",
    "RX.1": "The agent explicitly disclosed uncertainties regarding citations and novelty claims, marking confidence and missing evidence clearly.",
    "RX.3": "The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift, focusing solely on tightening the prose as requested.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors or harmful content were introduced; the cleaned-up text maintained integrity.",
    "RX.5": "While major rewrites were traced, minor edits lacked detailed annotations, reducing traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.75,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent removed redundant novelty claims but only named one prior work and articulated the delta without mapping against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged missing citations and uncertainties but did not audit every load-bearing citation thoroughly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly disclosed uncertainties regarding citations and novelty claims, marking confidence and missing evidence clearly.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift, focusing solely on tightening the prose as requested.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced; the cleaned-up text maintained integrity.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites were traced, minor edits lacked detailed annotations, reducing traceability.
